label: No hardcoded secrets detected
remediation: Move secrets to environment variables or a secrets manager and rotate exposed credentials.

label: .env excluded from git
remediation: Add .env files to .gitignore before committing.

label: Input validation library used
remediation: Validate untrusted input with schema validation before processing.

label: Rate limiting configured
remediation: Add application or edge rate limiting on sensitive endpoints.

label: Security headers configured
remediation: Set baseline security headers (CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options/etc).

label: No PII in log statements
remediation: Remove or mask PII from logs.

label: Privacy policy exists
remediation: Add a privacy policy describing data handling and user rights.

label: Data deletion mechanism documented
remediation: Document and implement account/data deletion workflow.

label: Secure password hashing used (bcrypt/argon2)
remediation: Use bcrypt/argon2/scrypt for credential hashing.

label: No plain text passwords in code
remediation: Remove plain-text credentials from source and use secure storage and hashing.

label: JWT secret not hardcoded
remediation: Load JWT secrets from environment variables or secret managers.

label: No card numbers in codebase
remediation: Do not store card PAN/CVV; use PCI-compliant tokenization providers.

label: Webhook signature verification present
remediation: Verify payment webhook signatures before processing events.

label: Error monitoring configured
remediation: Configure production error tracking (Sentry/Highlight/etc).

label: Health check endpoint exists
remediation: Expose a health endpoint for monitoring systems.

label: .env.example file exists
remediation: Add .env.example to document required variables.

label: No outline: none without replacement
remediation: Do not remove focus styles unless replaced with accessible alternatives.

label: Semantic HTML elements used
remediation: Use semantic landmarks and sectioning elements.

label: Loading state patterns present
remediation: Add loading states/skeletons/spinners for async UX.

label: Error boundaries implemented
remediation: Handle render/runtime errors with boundaries or framework equivalents.

label: API routes include version prefix
remediation: Version API routes to avoid breaking clients.

label: Pagination implemented on list endpoints
remediation: Use pagination on list endpoints to prevent unbounded responses.

label: No passwords sent in email body
remediation: Never send plain credentials by email; use one-time reset links.

label: Email sending service configured
remediation: Use a reliable email provider and configure domain authentication.

label: README.md exists
remediation: Add README with setup, usage, and architecture basics.

label: .env.example exists
remediation: Document environment variables in .env.example.

label: CHANGELOG.md exists
remediation: Track notable changes in a changelog.
